prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young South Asian woman with long wavy dark brown hair, center part, soft natural makeup, brown eyes, calm neutral expression standing beside a large apartment window at sunset. She faces the camera directly in a relaxed pose, framed from mid-thigh to head, wearing an oversized black retro American football jersey with large cream-and-orange number 32 on the front, striped sleeves, small NFL-style shield at the collar tucked loosely into high-waisted blue jeans, with a delicate small necklace. The setting is a warm apartment party or casual gathering: a tall window on the left with sheer curtains and a visible city skyline outside, intense golden sunlight streaming through the glass, a beer bottle and red plastic cup on the windowsill, and softly blurred people socializing in the background on the right near a glowing table lamp and wall art. Use warm amber sunset lighting, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, natural lens flare and rainbow flare across the lower right, cinematic color grading, 35mm photo look, intimate documentary style. Keep the composition vertical-square, subject centered slightly left, window light as the key light, background dim and out of focus, no text overlay or watermark.
